case_title: EBONY FLOURNOY VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPEMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $242.00 FILED BY FLOURNOY, EBONY AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPEMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA COLLEGE OF THE LAW, SAN FRANCISCO MEDIATORS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2023 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF EBONY FLOURNOY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINA SERRANO, ASSISTANT GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. MATTER WAS HEARD, JUDGMENT IS ENTERED. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG, CLERK: K. SEPTIEN, NOT REPORTED, (504).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLOURNOY, EBONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPEMENT CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CHRISTINA SERRANO (ASSISTANT MANAGER) FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPEMENT CORPORATION

**** THIS IS A NON-STIP TO JPT MATTER **** SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2023 - CONTINUED DUE PLAINTIFF NOT STIPULATING TO A PRO TEM JUDGE TO NOV-30-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EBONY FLOURNOY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED AT THE 11/9/23 PROGRESS REPORT HEARING AND INDICATED THAT ALL THE TERMS OF THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT KHAVE NOT BEEN COMPLIED WITH YET. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING HEARD BY A PRO TEM JUDGE. MATTER IS CONTINUED DUE TO PLAINTIFF NOT STIPULATING TO A PRO TEM JUDGE TO 11/30/23 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR ON 11/30/23 AS THE COURT MAY DECIDE TO RENDER A JUDGMENT ON THAT DATE IN THIS CASE BASED ON THE PARTIES' SIGNED VOLUNTARY MEDIATION AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLOURNOY, EBONY AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPEMENT CORPORATION

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE CCS GLOBAL SOLUTIONS, INC] SERVED AUG-17-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPEMENT CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-09-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EBONY FLOURNOY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINA SERRANO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FACILITATED BY THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA COLLEGE OF THE LAW, SAN FRANCISCO MEDIATORS. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IF THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT HAVE NOT BEEN COMPLETED, AND THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FORM WILL BE DISCLOSED TO THE HEARING OFFICER OF THE DAY. IF NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2023 - CONTINUED FORTHWITH TO NOV-30-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 504. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF EBONY FLOURNOY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENTERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPEMENT CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINA SERRANO, ASSISTANT GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
